english.title: Amazing Grace
english.lyrics:
Amazing grace! how sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me!
I once was lost, but now am found;
Was blind, but now I see.

yoruba.title: Ore-ọfẹ Iyanu
yoruba.lyrics:
Ore-ọfẹ iyanu, dun to!
To gba mi là
Mo ti sọnu tele, ṣugbọn mo ri;
Mo ti jẹ afọju, ṣugbọn mo ri bayi.

english.title: Great Is Thy Faithfulness
english.lyrics:
Great is Thy faithfulness, O God my Father;
There is no shadow of turning with Thee.

yoruba.title: Otitọ Rẹ Tobi
yoruba.lyrics:
Otitọ rẹ tobi, Baba mi;
Ko si iyipada ninu rẹ.

english.title: Holy Holy Holy
english.lyrics:
Holy, holy, holy! Lord God Almighty!
Early in the morning our song shall rise to Thee.

yoruba.title: Mimọ Mimọ Mimọ
yoruba.lyrics:
Mimọ, mimọ, mimọ! Oluwa Olodumare!
Ni kutukutu a kọ orin si ọ.

english.title: Blessed Assurance
english.lyrics:
Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine!
Oh what a foretaste of glory divine!

yoruba.title: Idaniloju Ibukun
yoruba.lyrics:
Idaniloju ibukun, Jesu ni temi!
Ayọ nla ni mo ni ninu Rẹ.

english.title: All Hail The Power
english.lyrics:
All hail the power of Jesus' name!
Let angels prostrate fall.

yoruba.title: Gbogbo Yin Oruko Jesu
yoruba.lyrics:
Gbogbo yin oruko Jesu!
Ki awọn angẹli foribalẹ.
